text_original: Even the free version is by FAR AND AWAY better than any paid versions of any other app like this I have tried so far! Going to sign up for a month of the highest tier now!
text_zh: 甚至连免费版都远比我目前尝试过的任何其他同类软件的付费版要好得多！现在就去订阅一个月的最高档会员！
reply_original: Wow, your review just made our entire team's day! We are thrilled that you love Fantasia so much. Welcome to the VIP family! If you ever need help with your subscription or have any questions, please feel free to reach out to us at support@fantachat.ai. Thank you for being so awesome and supporting us!
reply_zh: 哇，您的评价让我们的整个团队开心极了！我们非常高兴您如此喜爱 Fantasia。欢迎加入 VIP 大家庭！如果您在订阅方面需要任何帮助，或有任何疑问，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。感谢您这么棒，也谢谢您对我们的支持！
